Container.Name: ASA-Manager
Container.Overview: ARK Survival Ascended dedicated server with web-based management UI. Includes auto-install, settings editor, live log viewer, and RCON support. Built on Arch Linux with Proton-GE.

Config.Name: Server Data
Config.Description: Stores server files, saves, config, and logs.

Config.Name: Game Port (UDP)
Config.Description: ARK game port (UDP). Forward this on your router.

Config.Name: Game Port (TCP)
Config.Description: ARK game port (TCP).

Config.Name: Raw UDP Port
Config.Description: ARK raw UDP port (GamePort+1). Forward this on your router.

Config.Name: RCON Port
Config.Description: RCON remote console port.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: ASA Manager web interface port.

Config.Name: Map Name
Config.Description: ARK map to load. Examples: TheIsland_WP, Aberration_WP, ScorchedEarth_WP, TheCenter_WP

Config.Name: Session Name
Config.Description: Server name shown in the in-game server browser.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: RCON and in-game admin password. Change this!

Config.Name: Server Password
Config.Description: Password players need to join. Leave blank for a public server.

Config.Name: Max Players
Config.Description: Maximum number of players allowed on the server.

Config.Name: Game Port
Config.Description: Game port the ARK server listens on. Must match the mapped Game Port above.

Config.Name: RCON Port (Env)
Config.Description: RCON port the server listens on. Must match the mapped RCON Port above.

Config.Name: RCON Enabled
Config.Description: Enable RCON remote console (True/False).

Config.Name: BattlEye
Config.Description: Enable BattlEye anti-cheat (True/False). Requires additional setup.

Config.Name: Mod IDs
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of CurseForge mod IDs to install. Example: 927090,880477

Config.Name: Custom Server Args
Config.Description: Additional command-line arguments appended to the server launch command.

Config.Name: INI Path
Config.Description: Path to GameUserSettings.ini inside the container.

Config.Name: ARK Log Path
Config.Description: Path to the ARK server log file inside the container.

Config.Name: Server Dir
Config.Description: Directory where ARK server files are installed inside the container.
